# Horizon Care Services — Full Reference

## Company Overview

**Name:** Horizon Care Services Ltd
**Company No.:** 14615041
**Regulator:** Care Quality Commission (CQC)
**Compliance:** Health and Social Care Act 2008
**Address:** 475B Cheetham Hill Road, Manchester, M8 9LR
**Phone:** 020 3757 2767
**WhatsApp:** 020 3757 2767
**Email:** contact@horizoncareservices.org
**Website:** https://www.horizoncareservices.org

Horizon Care Services is a registered health and social care provider operating across England. We have been delivering care for several years, building a track record with NHS trusts, local authorities, families, and care organisations who need reliable professionals and consistent standards.

## Services

### Staffing Solutions
URL: https://www.horizoncareservices.org/services/staffing/

We supply skilled healthcare professionals to care organisations, NHS trusts, and local authorities at short or extended notice. Roles include:

- Registered Nurses (RGN, RMN, RNLD)
- Healthcare Assistants
- Support Workers
- Social Workers
- Occupational Therapists
- Physiotherapists

Available 24/7, including weekends and bank holidays. We accommodate single-shift requests and long-term contracts. All staff are DBS-checked and trained to relevant professional standards.

### Home Care
URL: https://www.horizoncareservices.org/services/home-care/

We deliver care to individuals in their own homes. Services include:

- Personal care (washing, dressing, personal hygiene)
- Medication support and management
- Domestic assistance
- Companionship and social support
- Respite for family carers

We aim to provide consistent, familiar carers wherever possible, because continuity matters to the people we support and to their families.

### Specialist Care
URL: https://www.horizoncareservices.org/services/specialist/

We provide specialist support for people with complex needs:

- Dementia and Alzheimer's support — tailored to the individual's stage and preferences
- Hospice care and end-of-life support — delivered with clinical competence and genuine sensitivity
- Life-limiting condition support — planned around the person and their family

All specialist care staff have relevant training and supervised experience in their area of specialism.

## Geographic Coverage

We operate in:
- Bedfordshire
- Buckinghamshire
- Cambridgeshire
- Hertfordshire
- Manchester
- London

We also work across England more broadly and regularly extend into new areas. Contact us if your location is not listed.

## Our Approach

### Strength-Based Practice
We start by understanding what a person can do, what matters to them, and where they want to get to. Care is planned around that — not a standard template. Every assessment is individual.

### Joined-Up Support
We work alongside NHS teams, social workers, GPs, and families. We take responsibility for our part and communicate clearly with everyone else involved.

### Honest Communication
We tell referrers what we can and cannot do. We keep families informed. We report changes in condition promptly and accurately.

## For NHS and Local Authority Referrers

We understand the pressures discharge planners and social workers operate under. We respond to referrals within 2 working days, provide clear written assessments, and keep referrers informed at every stage.

Referral page: https://www.horizoncareservices.org/referrals/
Contact for referrals: 020 3757 2767 or contact@horizoncareservices.org

## Careers

We recruit nurses, healthcare assistants, support workers, and allied health professionals. We provide structured onboarding, ongoing training, and consistent support.

Work for us: https://www.horizoncareservices.org/work-for-us/

- **WhatsApp:** 020 3757 2767 — 7 days a week
- **Email:** contact@horizoncareservices.org — response within 2 working days
- **Address:** 475B Cheetham Hill Road, Manchester, M8 9LR
